posts.title: Turning Compassion into Action
posts.excerpt: The Dorcas Fund was founded from a deeply personal promise to God. As a child, I experienced loss, rejection, and trauma. I understand what it means for a child to feel…
posts.bodyHtml:
The Dorcas Fund was founded from a deeply personal promise to God.

As a child, I experienced loss, rejection, and trauma. I understand what it means for a child to feel vulnerable, unseen, or uncertain about the future. Through the grace of God, my pain did not become the end of my story. It became part of the reason I now feel called to serve children and families facing hardship.

I made a vow to the Lord that whenever He gave me the ability and opportunity to help, I would do my best to support orphans, traumatized children, widows, and families in need.

That promise became The Dorcas Fund. 

Under the umbrella of World Ministries International, the Dorcas Fund exists to provide practical care with dignity and compassion. Our work has reached children and families in Kenya, the United States, Philippines and Israel. Now we are preparing to serve in Malawi.

This September, we plan to visit two orphanages and a village in Malawi. Our goal is to provide essential items that can make an immediate difference in daily life; including food supplies, clothing, sanitary products, mattresses, bedding, and other basic necessities.

The heart of the Dorcas Fund is not simply to give things. It is to remind people that they are seen, valued, and not forgotten.

We especially desire to reach children who have lost their parents, children living in single-parent households, children affected by trauma, and those who have been abandoned, rejected, or overlooked because of disability or poverty.

Every contribution, whether large or small, helps us continue this work. A donation can help place food on a table, provide a child with clean clothing, give a girl access to sanitary supplies, or allow a child to sleep on a proper mattress instead of the floor.

We invite individuals, churches, organizations, and friends of the ministry to partner with us in this Malawi initiative.

To give, please visit:  www.worldministries.org  and click on The Dorcas Fund tab. You can also call our office at (360) 629-5248 and use your credit/debit card or send a check or money order to World Ministries Int'l, PO Box 277, Stanwood, WA 98292 and designate your donation for The Dorcas Fund.

Together, we can turn compassion into practical action and bring hope to children who need to know that their lives matter.

Dr. Adalia Hansen
Founder, The Dorcas Fund
World Ministries International

posts.title: The Sacrifice God Desires
posts.excerpt: “And to love Him with all the heart, with all the understanding, with all the soul, and with all the strength, and to love one’s neighbor as oneself, is more than all the whole…
posts.bodyHtml:
“And to love Him with all the heart, with all the understanding, with all the soul, and with all the strength, and to love one’s neighbor as oneself, is more than all the whole burnt offerings and sacrifices.” — Mark 12:33 (AMP)

As intercessors, we understand sacrifice. We sacrifice our time in prayer, our sleep in night watches, our comfort in fasting, and often our finances in supporting the work of the Kingdom. We offer praise when we do not feel like praising and worship when circumstances are difficult. These sacrifices are precious before God.

Yet Jesus reminds us of something even greater.

In Mark 12:33, He declares that loving God with all our heart, understanding, soul, and strength, and loving our neighbor as ourselves, is more important than all burnt offerings and sacrifices.

This means that before God looks at the sacrifice, He looks at the heart offering it.

We may pray for nations, ministries, churches, leaders, and families, but if our hearts carry prejudice, bitterness, hatred, resentment, pride, or partiality, then we have missed the very foundation upon which true intercession is built. God desires not only prayers from our lips but love flowing from our hearts.

The Lord is not merely seeking intercessors who pray long prayers; He is seeking sons and daughters who love Him completely and reflect His love toward others. Our prayers gain greater weight when they flow from a heart surrendered to God and purified by His love.

Let us continually ask the Holy Spirit to search our hearts. Are we carrying unforgiveness? Do we have hatred toward certain people, races, tribes, denominations, or social classes? Are we praying for others while secretly harboring resentment toward them?

The greatest sacrifice is not merely what we give up; it is giving God our whole heart.

May our prayers, worship, fasting, and service be rooted in genuine love for God and sincere love for our neighbor. Then our sacrifices will rise before Him as a pleasing offering, flowing from a heart that reflects His own.

We appreciate all that you do. We are looking forward to the ministry work still left for this year. Pray for support that we will accomplish each mission.

Blessings, Dr. Adalia Hansen

 

Dear Prayer Partner,

1.  I want to thank you for your prayers as the $1,700 needed to travel to Prince Rupert, Canada on August 6-10 has been received in full. Great answer to prayer!

2.  Also, $1,935 has come in for the trip to Malawi with $8,065 still needing to come in.

3.  $582.72 was sent in for Zambia with a balance of $9,417.28 still needing to come in for travel to Zambia.

4.  We received $1,062.89 for Korea. We still need $4,937.11 to minister in Korea.

5.  We are still in need of $10,000 each for Kenya, Liberia, Tanzania, and Israel, as well as $9,000 for South Africa.

6.  The balance we need to travel and minister in the 8 remaining countries is $71,419.39.

Please earnestly pray with us that the remaining finances will come in so we can help the bride of Christ in these nations as well as the poor people that need food, clothing, shoes and other necessities.

Blessings, Dr. Jonathan Hansen

posts.title: Kenya Trip April 2026
posts.excerpt: April 1, 2026, my family and I arrived in Nairobi, Kenya at 9:55 pm. Bishop Geoffrey Njuguna graciously picked us up at the airport and took us to his home, where we stayed for…
posts.bodyHtml:
April 1, 2026, my family and I arrived in Nairobi, Kenya at 9:55 pm. Bishop Geoffrey Njuguna graciously picked us up at the airport and took us to his home, where we stayed for three nights before moving into Nairobi.

This 27-day mission trip was both important and busy. Each day was dedicated to various forms of ministry, ranging from conferences to church services and individual meetings. We focused on extending the Kingdom of God and discussing ways to continue expanding God’s Kingdom.

On April 2, I had an opportunity to pray for Rev. Dr. Judy Mbugua at her home, after which we visited and prayed for Pastor Elizabeth Njuguna’s mother. The following day, April 3, Bishop Njuguna and I spoke at Deliverance Ignite International Conference, and I later held a private meeting with a leader that evening.

On April 4th, in addition to meeting with Bishop Geoffrey Njuguna in the morning, I met with Bishop Mike Adipo and later with Apostle Joe Mwaniki. Each of these meetings dealt with Kenya and the nations, and what the church leaders must do to bring salvation and transformation rather than tyranny and judgement.

On Sunday, April 5, my wife Dr. Adalia and I had the privilege of ministering at Langata Deliverance Church in Nairobi, pastored by Bishop Geoffrey Njuguna. The service was notably attended by the former Vice President of Kenya and 2027 Kenyan Presidential candidate Stephen Kalonzo Musuyoka (SKM), along with approximately 50 members of parliament. During my sermon I focused on Resurrection Day and the question, “What DNA are you?” My wife also actively participated by praying for many individuals and a powerful moment occurred when a lady was delivered from a demon at the feet of Hon. Musyoka. The service was impactful as I called for a national repentance to save Kenya from tyranny and to ensure the integrity of the elections.

On April 6, we met with Prophet Paul and Prophetess Janet Songo to discuss the current situation in Kenya and to strategize on the necessary steps to bring about salvation for the nation.

On the following day, April 7th, I spoke at the gathering of the Kenya Coalition of Church Alliances & Ministers. The top church leaders, including archbishops, were in attendance. I spoke on the need for National Repentance and highlighted how the New World Order (NWO) Elite have chosen their leaders in the nations and emphasized that only the church can protect the integrity of elections. The elite invest heavily in candidates so they become puppets, forcing the people to become slaves and take a mark/chip so they cannot buy or sell without it. Christians must ensure that men and women of Christian morality are elected to leadership so that nations remain under God’s principles and not the NWO and tyranny.

That evening, I met with Bishop Dr. Constantine Mwadime and the Hon. Dennis Mutuku, to discuss the importance of National Repentance and practical economic solutions that can help both people and nations.

On April 8th, we met with Bishop Eliphas Mitugo and that evening had dinner with SKM at his residence with the Hon Stephen Mule, MP. We discussed the need for National Repentance among other things.

From April 9-11, I met with various leaders, continually discussing the situation in Kenya and the need for National Repentance.

On Sunday, April 12, we ministered at Bishop Thomas Muthee’s church, Word of Faith, in Kiambu, Kenya. Rev. Phyllis Muthee MC’d the services while Bishop Thomas was away, dedicating a newly built church. In the first service, I spoke on “I am a Debtor,” and in the second service, I ministered on “Moses Rod & Eagles Arise.”

From Monday through Friday, April 13th—17th, Bishop Muthee’s Church hosted the Rebecca Arise Women’s International Conference, where my wife was one of the speakers. Bishop Muthee and I took part in both the opening Monday service and closing Friday service. What a tremendous conference!

Sunday, April 19, we ministered at Tabernacle of Grace City of Hope Church; pastored by Prophet Paul and Prophetess Janet Songo. It was a powerful meeting marked by a strong manifestation of the Holy Spirit.

On April 20th, we continued meeting with leaders. Tuesday the 21st , I met with Bishop Paul Karanja, followed by meetings with Bishop Dennis Nthumbi and that evening with Apostle Joe Mwaniki. My wife met with Christina Shusho a very well-known gospel singer. They discussed helping the poor in Tanzania while I continued to talk to the leaders about National Repentance in the nations and the responsibilities of the Church Leaders.

On Wednesday April 22nd, I recorded three television programs at Prayer TV Kiambu, Kenya. Later in the day, I met with Pastor Joshua and Esther Muthee, followed by Hon. Mutuku.

On Thursday, the 23rd, in addition to breakfast and dinner with leaders, we ministered for Rev. Dr. Judy Mbugua at Homecare Spiritual Fellowship. Dr. Judy is doing a tremendous work among women and children in the slums. Bishop Michael Wafula and Hon. Mutuku also attended this meeting. Besides a summary of the need for National Repentance, I spoke on “Don’t Lose Hope”. The Holy Spirit specifically tailored this message to minister to the women present.

On Friday, the 24th, we again held meetings throughout the day. In between, we met with the Malawi High Commissioner, discussing a return trip to Malawi to meet with the government officials and the initiative to help meet the needs of the poor.

April 25th, I conducted a staff meeting and led a devotional at the WMI Bible College. Later, Bishop Dr. Tobias Nyamwaya, WMI Bible College Director, took Dr. Adalia and me out for lunch.

On Sunday, April 26, we ministered at Kitengela Deliverance Church under Bishop Mohammed Kamwaro. Once again, we had a tremendous service. The remainder of the day was spent meeting with various leaders.

On my final day in Kenya, April 27th, before flying out close to midnight, I continued meeting with different leaders, including another with SKM, the 2027 Kenya Presidential Candidate.

This was a highly productive and impactful mission trip. We believe it is important to return this year to continue the work of pushing for National Repentance and strengthening relationships with church and national leaders.

Please prayerfully consider helping us return through your generous mission love offering. Thank you for your prayers, support, and partnership in advancing the Kingdom of God.

posts.title: King David's Mighty Men
posts.excerpt: NOTE: A LEADER MUST BE LEAD. WHO IS LEADING YOU? NEVER BITE THE HAND THAT FEEDS YOU! Like Jesus turned his pathetic disciples into mighty apostles, David turned his men who were…
posts.bodyHtml:
NOTE: A LEADER MUST BE LEAD.  WHO IS LEADING YOU?

NEVER BITE THE HAND THAT FEEDS YOU!

Like Jesus turned his pathetic disciples into mighty apostles, David turned his men who were outcasts into his mighty men.

2 Samuel 23:14-16 King James Version

14 And David was then in an hold, and the garrison of the Philistines was then in Bethlehem.

15 And David longed, and said, Oh that one would give me drink of the water of the well of Bethlehem, which is by the gate!

16 And the three mighty men brake through the host of the Philistines, and drew water out of the well of Bethlehem, that was by the gate, and took it, and brought it to David: nevertheless he would not drink thereof, but poured it out unto the Lord.

NOTE:  A LEADER IS ONE WHO OTHERS FOLLOW!

Ephesians 3:10-11

10 To the intent that now unto the principalities and powers in heavenly places might be known by the church the manifold wisdom of God,

11 According to the eternal purpose which he purposed in Christ Jesus our Lord:

Ephesians 3:17

17 That Christ may dwell in your hearts by faith; that ye, being rooted and grounded in love,

Ephesians 3:20

20 Now unto him that is able to do exceeding abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that worketh in us,

David was a type of Christ.

David was the strength of Israel who built Israel.

Solomon dismantled Israel.

Luke 24:30-31

30 And it came to pass, as he sat at meat with them, he took bread, and blessed it, and brake, and gave to them.

NOTE:  Breaking Bread is sacrifice.  Jesus sacrificed His life for us. 

31 And their eyes were opened, and they knew him; and he vanished out of their sight.

Luke 24:45

45 Then opened he their understanding, that they might understand the scriptures,

NOTE:  Insight for foresight.  Jesus opened His disciples understanding.  Your leader opens your understanding so you can be effective and as you continue to be humble you become very effective capable of leading others.

Isaiah 6

1 In the year that king Uzziah died I saw also the Lord sitting upon a throne, high and lifted up, and his train filled the temple.

2 Above it stood the seraphims: each one had six wings; with twain he covered his face, and with twain he covered his feet, and with twain he did fly.

3 And one cried unto another, and said, Holy, holy, holy, is the Lord of hosts: the whole earth is full of his glory.

4 And the posts of the door moved at the voice of him that cried, and the house was filled with smoke.

5 Then said I, Woe is me! for I am undone; because I am a man of unclean lips, and I dwell in the midst of a people of unclean lips: for mine eyes have seen the King, the Lord of hosts.

6 Then flew one of the seraphims unto me, having a live coal in his hand, which he had taken with the tongs from off the altar:

7 And he laid it upon my mouth, and said, Lo, this hath touched thy lips; and thine iniquity is taken away, and thy sin purged.

8 Also I heard the voice of the Lord, saying, Whom shall I send, and who will go for us? Then said I, Here am I; send me.

9 And he said, Go, and tell this people, Hear ye indeed, but understand not; and see ye indeed, but perceive not.

10 Make the heart of this people fat, and make their ears heavy, and shut their eyes; lest they see with their eyes, and hear with their ears, and understand with their heart, and convert, and be healed.

11 Then said I, Lord, how long? And he answered, Until the cities be wasted without inhabitant, and the houses without man, and the land be utterly desolate,

12 And the Lord have removed men far away, and there be a great forsaking in the midst of the land.

13 But yet in it shall be a tenth, and it shall return, and shall be eaten: as a teil tree, and as an oak, whose substance is in them, when they cast their leaves: so the holy seed shall be the substance thereof.

CONCLUSION:  King David began from Bethlehem.  He killed the lion and the bear and did other exploits from Bethlehem.  He longed for the fresh clean waters from the well in Bethlehem at the gate.  It was inhabited now by the Philistines.     

But three of David’s mighty men risked their lives to bring David the water he longed for.  David was a humble righteous leader who poured the water out as a sacrifice to God since the water was to precious for him to drink as it risked his men’s lives.

The key is to follow a leader who is following Christ humbly and will die for Christ if necessary.  Keep your heart clean always honoring and respecting your leader as David’s mighty men did without a spirit of familiarity so rebellion or the spirit of witchcraft does not enter you causing you to become a Judas or Absalom instead of a Peter, James, or John. 

Become a mighty man of God doing great exploits like David’s mighty men winning battle after battle and uniting the kingdom of Israel. 

Within WMI, God has been cleaning up my staff so they can sacrifice their lives unto death fully trained in the word of God with understanding operating with the gifts of the Holy Spirit.   

WMI is a very unique ministry that deals with the leadership of nations both politically and the church.  That means my staff has to be highly trained and humble willing to sacrifice their time, energy and resources if needed to get the job/mission done.

I have given up my life, job and career to sacrificially live in countries with little income, sleeping on the floor for six years, being threatened with prison and death, working six days per week even now.

I want all of my staff, even the women, to be trained in the word of God even earning a doctorate degree in ministry etc.

With our teaching seven days a week on radio, television, pod casts, Bible School, chapel, teaching articles twice each month etc., they have more opportunity to be better equipped in the Word of God than any staff in any church as I am also daily imparting and discipling them as Christ did. 

David did not put up with disloyalty, he even had Joab killed. I cannot afford to tolerate it ever again as it brings a curse on this ministry and the funds dry up.  My staff work directly for me, not the board etc.  If I am not happy with their performance, I have to let them go.  I will not put up with debate or arguing over policy or dress etc.  I have my standards to work with leadership as pilots do in the airlines, soldiers in the military or law enforcement and leaders do in the corporate or political world who work with leaders. 

Working on my team at WMI is a special privilege to be trained to meet with leaders in the nations and be respected as one of my team.  Together we will do great exploits and unite the church as David united Israel through many battles but finally victory. 

We are living in very perilous times. We need mighty men and women who will sacrificially serve the Lord in word and deed.  Speak the truth where you live because truth takes away deception and prayer brings conviction.  The world is under a spirit of deceivableness from the father of all lies as scriptures explain and Satan uses evil men as his spokesman.  God uses you and I to speak the truth so people are not led astray.

Please help me continue to speak the truth to the nations by my travels and daily through our programs.  All of this cost money and we cannot continue without it. 

In August 2026, we need to minister in Canada and our tickets alone will cost us about $1,700 USD. We also are due to travel to Kenya again and onto Liberia and Malawi, followed by Tanzania, Zambia, South Africa, South Korea and Israel. We will need another $75,000 USD minimum to travel to these nine countries.

Please help us now to reach these nations.

Blessings, Jonathan Hansen

posts.title: World Ministries International Family
posts.excerpt: Dear World Ministries International Family, We give thanks to God for His covering over our recent mission to Kenya. Through your prayers, the trip was not only successful but…
posts.bodyHtml:
Dear World Ministries International Family,

We give thanks to God for His covering over our recent mission to Kenya. Through your prayers, the trip was not only successful but deeply impactful. We held multiple gatherings, including a powerful women’s conference, Sunday services, and private ministry sessions. In every setting, the presence of God was undeniable, bringing deliverance, healing, and breakthrough to many lives.

We witnessed doors opening beyond what we expected, even into other nations. Truly, your prayers carried us and we are grateful for your unwavering spiritual support.

As we look ahead, we are preparing for missions in Malawi and Tanzania in due time this year. We humbly ask you to continue standing with us in prayer for divine provision, for partners, and for laborers willing to go into the field. 

Through our Dorcas ministry, we are believing God to extend practical love to communities in need. Our vision includes supporting widows and orphans, providing clothing, food, and basic necessities such as sanitary pads, etc., and empowering women by helping them start small businesses. We desire to bring both spiritual and tangible transformation to these villages and communities.

We ask that you pray with us for helpers, resources, and hearts willing to join this mission. May God connect us with those who will hold our hands in this work, so that together we may serve and uplift those in need.

Thank you for standing with us. Your prayers are not in vain.

With gratitude and faith, Dr. Adalia Hansen

 

Dear Saint,

  1. We thank God for His provisions or we could not travel the nations.
  2. We need to travel to Tanzania and Malawi soon, as we have been requested to go to both. The needs in both of these African countries are enormous. As soon as we receive $10,000 for each of these countries, we will buy the tickets and go. We will go to whichever country we receive the finances for first, followed by the second country. 
  3. Zambia is on the horizon as God is opening the doors and the Holy Spirit is confirming in 2026, we will also labor there for the Lord. If we receive a donation of $30,000 for these three countries, we will immediately purchase our tickets and put together the itinerary for these nations. 
  4. Time is racing by and the New World Order is already strategizing to control these nations. Only the church can stop it with proper leadership leading a National Repentance. Help me to meet with the leadership of both, church and government, to come under the authority of Jesus Christ and lead a National Repentance. 
  5. Thank you for your prayers and your financial response to these requests as I know people do pray and one or more of you give to these critical requests and special needs. 
  6. I desperately need thousands of additional intercessors. Please join our team we call The Soldiers of the Cross and help us pray our way to victories. Respond today to this email article, or call (360) 629-5248 or sign up on our web site: worldministries.org. 

Blessings, Dr. Jonathan Hansen

posts.excerpt: In Sodom and Gomorrah and the plain cities the people were so immoral and evil that they even wanted to rape the angels. The spirit of demons manifesting from the people who…
posts.bodyHtml:
In Sodom and Gomorrah and the plain cities the people were so immoral and evil that they even wanted to rape the angels. The spirit of demons manifesting from the people who wanted to kill Lot and rape his two guests was filled with hatred and rage against anybody who opposed their thinking, values and morality just as it is today in America.

If you watch people, including political leaders in NYC; Minneapolis-St. Paul; Dearborn, Michigan; Portland, Oregon; and Seattle, Washington etc., these anti-Christ,  lawless, immoral Communist and Islamic individuals scream and holler and use profane language right in your face. The governors and mayors of these cities will themselves inflame violence against authorities like ICE and President Trump. They say, “get the f... out of our city and state. They deliberately fan the flames of violence against ICE and President Trump as well as any Christian that stands up for Jesus Christ values and morality. Also these authorities are going directly against the federal law and should be arrested. America definitely has the spirit of Sodom & Gomorrah living within the nation and judgment is sure to follow as my book, THE SCIENCE OF JUDGMENT, explains in scientific detail.

You can read the following two transcripts authored by Liz Wheeler and Pastor Dennis Cummings verifying the dire situation in America today.  These transcripts describe what really happened when ICE was trying to arrest criminals and Renee Good tried to stop them. She rammed her vehicle into the ICE agent sending him to the hospital with internal bleeding. This truth is not reported by the liberal media who are working together with the forces trying to topple the Republic under God into a Communist nation. They will align with the New World Order against believers as described in Revelation chapter 13.

The second transcript is an address by Pastor Dennis Cummings at the Constitutional Sheriffs and Peace Officers Association conference. I was invited as a VIP to this conference together with various senators, congressmen, many sheriffs and General Mike Flynn who was the special speaker. This conference was an effort to stop the takeover of sheriff's authority which was always an elected office, but now the states are trying to change the sheriff to either an appointed office or operate under the city or state government. This would nearly turn the Sheriff's Department into a police state rather than an independent entity protecting the freedoms of the people who elected them.

TRANSCRIPT BY LIZ WHEELER 

They are trying to turn Renee Good into George Floyd. Same tactics, same lies, same commie goals. Do not fall for it, because this is what actually happened.

Renee Good was using her car to block ICE agents. That's illegal. ICE agents were walking around her vehicle, videotaping her license tag and the car to document her law-breaking. They finally told her verbally to get out of the car in order to arrest her after giving her many chances to move along without being arrested. She refused. Renee Good defied the legal order of a law enforcement officer.

Then her lesbian sex partner, who had attended an anti-ICE meeting of radicals earlier in the week, started shouting from outside the car into the car at Renee Good: "Drive, baby, drive!"

One of the ICE agents who was videotaping her car was standing directly in front of the car at the time. She violently accelerated the car anyway and rammed her car into that ICE agent.

No, Renee Good was not armed, but that's a deliberately misleading and manipulative way of portraying her—just because you don't have a gun in your hand doesn't mean you aren't operating a deadly weapon. In fact, thousands of times every year in the United States, cars and vehicles are used for killings.

The ICE agent was justified in his action, reasonably fearing for his life after Renee Good not only defied his order, but violently and viciously accelerated into him, running him over.

And yes, Renee Good did have children: two children from her first marriage whom she did not "retain custody of," and one child from her second marriage. That second marriage ended when her husband died. This was all before she turned lesbian.

And yes, it's certainly awful and tragic that the six-year-old child will grow up without a mother. But that's the thing about leftist ideology: It teaches women to put Communist ideology on a higher pedestal than their families, to prioritize their political activism over their own children.

If you're committed to your child, you don't taunt law enforcement officers. You don't use your  personal vehicle as a blockade. You don't viciously and violently accelerate into an ICE agent who's standing in front of your car. That's a choice and Renee Good made that choice. She chose doing that over her own child….

Read Pastor Dennis Cummings' opening comments at the Constitutional Sheriffs and Peace Officers Association Conference held at Pastor Cummings' church.

Tonight I want to be the tuning fork to set the tone. A lot of people are saying, "Why am I hosting this event at a church?" It's because we're facing an epidemic in the state of Washington, not of illness, not of ignorance, but an epidemic of willful confusion. It's men abandoning their responsibilities, leaders surrendering their clarity, and institutions trading truth for comfort. This confusion is no longer abstract. It's visible. It's tangible. It's tampons in the men's restrooms. It's willful, institutionalized confusion.

The result is leaders who are unwilling to say what is obvious, afraid to affirm what is true, and too timid to protect the order of sanity. When responsibility is abandoned, confusion always rushes in to fill the vacuum. We're watching this in the world today, and it is unraveling at it's foundations. The world can't seem to define what a woman is, but it's because the church has forgotten what it means to be a man. The question shouldn't be "What is a woman?" The question should be "Where are the men?", pastors that have lost their testicular fortitude to proclaim the truth of God's word.

There's an old saying: When good men do nothing, evil triumphs. Let me tell you something. I changed that saying. When good men do nothing, they're no longer good. They're a part of the evil. Silence is never neutral. Passivity is never harmless. Abdication is never virtuous. And here's the uncomfortable truth we have to face before I pray: the greatest crisis we're dealing with is not violent men. It's effeminate men.

Let me be clear, it's not about personalities, sensitivities, or temperaments. Effeminacy is about softness toward responsibility. It's men without a backbone. It's men without the presence of leadership in their life. It's not knowing what is right. It's refusing to say what is right. It's Adam standing silent while the serpent spoke. He wasn't confused. He wasn't deceived. He was quiet. And in his silence, he transferred his authority to the chaos. The pattern has not changed. When men go silent, confusion grows loud. When men refuse to lead, others fill the vacuum. When men shrink back, families are weakened. Systems rot.

And you know what? Masculinity is not toxic. Silence is. This is why the church matters. It's the ekklēsia. This is why men matter. This is why leadership matters. That's why tonight matters. But when we grow silent, government grows bigger while fathers grow small. So we don't need louder rhetoric. We need men that will lead their homes, men that will lead in truth without apology, men that will not outsource their responsibility to the government. Not with rage, not with violence, but with conviction, clarity, and courage…

Genesis 18:15-33  KJV

15 Then Sarah denied, saying, I laughed not; for she was afraid. And he said, Nay; but thou didst laugh.

16 And the men rose up from thence, and looked toward Sodom: and Abraham went with them to bring them on the way.

17 And the Lord said, Shall I hide from Abraham that thing which I do;

18 Seeing that Abraham shall surely become a great and mighty nation, and all the nations of the earth shall be blessed in him?

19 For I know him, that he will command his children and his household after him, and they shall keep the way of the Lord, to do justice and judgment; that the Lord may bring upon Abraham that which he hath spoken of him.

20 And the Lord said, Because the cry of Sodom and Gomorrah is great, and because their sin is very grievous;

21 I will go down now, and see whether they have done altogether according to the cry of it, which is come unto me; and if not, I will know.

22 And the men turned their faces from thence, and went toward Sodom: but Abraham stood yet before the Lord.

23 And Abraham drew near, and said, Wilt thou also destroy the righteous with the wicked?

24 Peradventure there be fifty righteous within the city: wilt thou also destroy and not spare the place for the fifty righteous that are therein?

25 That be far from thee to do after this manner, to slay the righteous with the wicked: and that the righteous should be as the wicked, that be far from thee: Shall not the Judge of all the earth do right?

26 And the Lord said, If I find in Sodom fifty righteous within the city, then I will spare all the place for their sakes.

27 And Abraham answered and said, Behold now, I have taken upon me to speak unto the Lord, which am but dust and ashes:

28 Peradventure there shall lack five of the fifty righteous: wilt thou destroy all the city for lack of five? And he said, If I find there forty and five, I will not destroy it.

29 And he spake unto him yet again, and said, Peradventure there shall be forty found there. And he said, I will not do it for forty's sake.

30 And he said unto him, Oh let not the Lord be angry, and I will speak: Peradventure there shall thirty be found there. And he said, I will not do it, if I find thirty there.

31 And he said, Behold now, I have taken upon me to speak unto the Lord: Peradventure there shall be twenty found there. And he said, I will not destroy it for twenty's sake.

32 And he said, Oh let not the Lord be angry, and I will speak yet but this once: Peradventure ten shall be found there. And he said, I will not destroy it for ten's sake.

33 And the Lord went his way, as soon as he had left communing with Abraham: and Abraham returned unto his place.

NOTE:  First let’s look at how merciful God is to Sarah as she laughed, doubting the word of the Lord. When the Lord challenged her on her laughing, Sarah even then lied because of fear. Sarah  was then corrected by the Lord, not judged with penalty for her disbelief and lie. God constantly gives mercy and grace to Christians today who daily disbelieve or lie about what God is telling them through the Word of God; the Holy Spirit, their pastor, spouse, children and friends. The Lord made the earth which is alive and He tells Abraham that it cries for justice. The Lord, making sure what He was told is true, is going down to see for himself before executing judgment. We also see Moses petitioning God on behalf of the people in Sodom and Gomorrah to spare judgment. Notice that Abraham was very respectful in his conversation with God, not haughty or demanding. Also understand this is not a rule that God will not judge a city or nation if they have ten righteous people in it. In the Bible it has to have at least two examples to create a biblical example to go by. God just knew Abraham could not come up with even ten so He entertained his intercession.     

Genesis 19  KJV

1 And there came two angels to Sodom at even; and Lot sat in the gate of Sodom: and Lot seeing them rose up to meet them; and he bowed himself with his face toward the ground;

2 And he said, Behold now, my lords, turn in, I pray you, into your servant's house, and tarry all night, and wash your feet, and ye shall rise up early, and go on your ways. And they said, Nay; but we will abide in the street all night.

3 And he pressed upon them greatly; and they turned in unto him, and entered into his house; and he made them a feast, and did bake unleavened bread, and they did eat.

4 But before they lay down, the men of the city, even the men of Sodom, compassed the house round, both old and young, all the people from every quarter:

5 And they called unto Lot, and said unto him, Where are the men which came in to thee this night? bring them out unto us, that we may know them.

6 And Lot went out at the door unto them, and shut the door after him,

7 And said, I pray you, brethren, do not so wickedly.

8 Behold now, I have two daughters which have not known man; let me, I pray you, bring them out unto you, and do ye to them as is good in your eyes: only unto these men do nothing; for therefore came they under the shadow of my roof.

9 And they said, Stand back. And they said again, This one fellow came in to sojourn, and he will needs be a judge: now will we deal worse with thee, than with them. And they pressed sore upon the man, even Lot, and came near to break the door.

10 But the men put forth their hand, and pulled Lot into the house to them, and shut to the door.

11 And they smote the men that were at the door of the house with blindness, both small and great: so that they wearied themselves to find the door.

12 And the men said unto Lot, Hast thou here any besides? son in law, and thy sons, and thy daughters, and whatsoever thou hast in the city, bring them out of this place:

13 For we will destroy this place, because the cry of them is waxen great before the face of the Lord; and the Lord hath sent us to destroy it.

14 And Lot went out, and spake unto his sons in law, which married his daughters, and said, Up, get you out of this place; for the Lord will destroy this city. But he seemed as one that mocked unto his sons in law.

15 And when the morning arose, then the angels hastened Lot, saying, Arise, take thy wife, and thy two daughters, which are here; lest thou be consumed in the iniquity of the city.

16 And while he lingered, the men laid hold upon his hand, and upon the hand of his wife, and upon the hand of his two daughters; the Lord being merciful unto him: and they brought him forth, and set him without the city.

17 And it came to pass, when they had brought them forth abroad, that he said, Escape for thy life; look not behind thee, neither stay thou in all the plain; escape to the mountain, lest thou be consumed.

18 And Lot said unto them, Oh, not so, my Lord:

19 Behold now, thy servant hath found grace in thy sight, and thou hast magnified thy mercy, which thou hast shewed unto me in saving my life; and I cannot escape to the mountain, lest some evil take me, and I die:

20 Behold now, this city is near to flee unto, and it is a little one: Oh, let me escape thither, (is it not a little one?) and my soul shall live.

21 And he said unto him, See, I have accepted thee concerning this thing also, that I will not overthrow this city, for the which thou hast spoken.

22 Haste thee, escape thither; for I cannot do anything till thou be come thither. Therefore the name of the city was called Zoar.

23 The sun was risen upon the earth when Lot entered into Zoar.

24 Then the Lord rained upon Sodom and upon Gomorrah brimstone and fire from the Lord out of heaven;

25 And he overthrew those cities, and all the plain, and all the inhabitants of the cities, and that which grew upon the ground.

26 But his wife looked back from behind him, and she became a pillar of salt.

27 And Abraham gat up early in the morning to the place where he stood before the Lord:

28 And he looked toward Sodom and Gomorrah, and toward all the land of the plain, and beheld, and, lo, the smoke of the country went up as the smoke of a furnace.

29 And it came to pass, when God destroyed the cities of the plain, that God remembered Abraham, and sent Lot out of the midst of the overthrow, when he overthrew the cities in the which Lot dwelt.

30 And Lot went up out of Zoar, and dwelt in the mountain, and his two daughters with him; for he feared to dwell in Zoar: and he dwelt in a cave, he and his two daughters.

31 And the firstborn said unto the younger, Our father is old, and there is not a man in the earth to come in unto us after the manner of all the earth:

32 Come, let us make our father drink wine, and we will lie with him, that we may preserve seed of our father.

33 And they made their father drink wine that night: and the firstborn went in, and lay with her father; and he perceived not when she lay down, nor when she arose.

34 And it came to pass on the morrow, that the firstborn said unto the younger, Behold, I lay yesternight with my father: let us make him drink wine this night also; and go thou in, and lie with him, that we may preserve seed of our father.

35 And they made their father drink wine that night also: and the younger arose, and lay with him; and he perceived not when she lay down, nor when she arose.

36 Thus were both the daughters of Lot with child by their father.

37 And the first born bare a son, and called his name Moab: the same is the father of the Moabites unto this day.

38 And the younger, she also bare a son, and called his name Benammi: the same is the father of the children of Ammon unto this day.

CONCLUSION:

America today has the spirit of Sodom and Gomorrah with its evil, lawless, immoral and rebellious people. They are supported by many liberal, lawless, immoral politicians who will not define the biology of a girl as the Bible does, and how every civilization has for thousands of years since the beginning of time until this present generation.

Note that Lot got into this immoral situation because he wanted to make money instead of wanting first and foremost to please God. Lot became friends with these sodomites instead of obeying the scriptures which warn us not to become unequally yoked. Lot raised his family in this immoral city and some of his daughters married ungodly men who would not listen or respect Lot as their father-in-law. Lot was not only a bad father, but he was a bad husband. His wife fell in love with this wicked city and all it had to offer. Consequently, she was judged with it. This story is a strong example of what can happen to our families if we don’t obey the scriptures.   

God showed mercy and grace to Lot when two angels pulled him to safety inside his house. Then He blinded the eyes of the city dwellers that were very demonically hostile to him. They wanted to harm him because he would not send out the two visitors so that they could sexually abuse them. God showed more mercy to Lot and his family, allowing Lot to warn his son-in laws. Then God pulled Lot to safety outside the city with his two daughters and wife when they procrastinated leaving as urgently warned. Lot's wife continued to resist, wanting to live in that corrupt, immoral city until she was finally judged with it.

God continued to show more mercy and grace by allowing Lot to live in Zoar, his first request. Then God allowed Lot to live on the mountain when Lot changed his mind saying he was afraid to live in Zoar. This continued to show that Lot still did not fully trust in God, because he made decisions based on fear and not on the leading of the Lord.

God also showed mercy and grace to Lot after he became drunk and mistakenly slept with his two daughters on two consecutive nights. They each conceived and had his children.

Lot's life was not as immoral as the inhabitants of Sodom and Gomorrah were before they were judged and destroyed. However, Lot was not living for the Lord, but for himself. Many people today who classify themselves as Christians are not really living for the Lord. They are not really trying to please God with all their heart, strength, mind and soul.  Lot violated many of God’s laws, including getting drunk and allowing his daughters to deceive him into having sex with them, but there was no lust by Lot.

When a person is not close to God, they make many mistakes that a person walking intimately with God would not make. This story is a perfect example to show the ramifications of not working out ones salvation with fear and trembling as the Bible advocates. It also shows the mercy and grace of God demonstrated to people until they reach a point of no return. That is where God’s grace cannot reach them further because they have grieved the Holy Spirit too many times and now they have a seared conscience, not capable of listening to truth that leads to repentance. My book, THE SCIENCE OF JUDGMENT, explains this perfectly and what causes nations and people to go past the point of no return where judgment and destruction is certain.

posts.bodyHtml:
On January 8, 2026, we met in Surrey, Canada in several meetings to discuss the churches responsibility in addressing the threat of a Communist takeover of Canada. We also discussed how we can work together in different nations including, Malaysia and Hong Kong. Vee Sitoh’s daughter, who is a medical doctor, could assist my wife in treating widows and orphans in Kenya and other nations such as the Philippines. 

After the meetings in Surrey, we met with the Supeyo’s in Langley, Canada to continue the discussion on the potential Communist takeover of Canada and to define the responsibilities of true Apostolic Leaders in responding spiritually and proactively, placing Canada under Jesus Christ. We also discussed other nations where we can work collaborate such as Israel.

After our meetings concluded in Langley, we traveled to Puyallup, Washington, to take part in a major conference organized by the American Police Officers Alliance “Save Our Sheriffs Rally”, in partnership with the Constitutional Sheriffs and Peace Officers Association (CSPOA). The event was held at the Experience Christian Church pastored by Dennis Cummings. I was personally invited to attend the VIP meeting where I met with the different Sheriffs, Senators, Congressmen and other leaders. General Mike Flynn was the featured speaker, and I had the opportunity to spend time with him, including a special breakfast meeting, with my son present. At one point, General Flynn kindly watched Michael while I got my breakfast, which spoke volumes about his character. I was very touched and impressed. 

This conference was organized in response to efforts in Washington State to replace elected Sheriffs, even pursuing legal action against those who actively fight crime. It was a tremendous conference. Since then, Washington State has passed a concerning bill that could enable greater control over the public by limiting their rights to retain the sheriffs they elect, thereby endangering their freedom. I invite you to join me in leading a national repentance.  Join Eagles Saving Nations now at worldministries.org.

posts.bodyHtml:

posts.excerpt: We departed from Seattle on November 19, 2025 and landed in the Philippines on the 20 th . Our journey involved a flight from Seattle to Korea, followed by a layover before…
posts.bodyHtml:
We departed from Seattle on November 19, 2025 and landed in the Philippines on the 20th. Our journey involved a flight from Seattle to Korea, followed by a layover before reaching the Philippines. International travel is indeed quite tiring. My World Ministries International (WMI) team included my wife, Dr. Adalia Hansen, my son MJ, and Dr. Mike Hyodo. Bishop Israel Sanoy of Love Fellowship Church International (LFCI) and others welcomed us at the airport with a lovely sign.

On Friday, November 21st, we embarked on a four-hour car ride to Palayan, where we shared a meal with Pastors Susan Cabrera, MC Gabriel, and their family. The following day, the 22nd, we participated in an inauguration and dedication ceremony for the Palayan branch of LFCI, during which I delivered a message. After the service, we dined at the retreat center and later held an open-air crusade focused on salvation and healing. I spoke on the topic of "It's Supernatural and God is real." We distributed food, shoes, and other essentials, with games available for children as well. It was a remarkable experience, with many people accepting Christ and receiving healing.

On Sunday, the 23rd, we traveled to the LFCI Cabanatuan, Nueva Ecija branch, where I addressed the Church's Responsibility to save the Philippines. My wife offered prayers, resulting in many healings. Following the service, we were hosted at a member's house, where we were served balut, a hard-boiled duck egg with feathers inside the shell. It was quite an experience, as they considered it a rite of passage to becoming Filipino. We then dedicated the Rizal LFCI branch, prayed for the neighbors, and visited entrepreneur Edwin Canlas, interviewing him and Bishop Sanoy for my television program.

On November 25th, we navigated canoes to the flooded areas, a result of corruption, and ministered at the Meysulao LFCI branch, which had been relocated to the second floor due to flooding. I preached, leading to many conversions, while Adalia's prayers resulted in numerous healings. We provided them with much needed food relief, learning later that the water was over ten feet deep and infested with alligators, pythons, and sharks, unbeknownst to us at the time.

On the 27th, Bishop Sanoy, myself, and other LFCI team members visited the Pampanga Maximum Security Prison. I delivered a sermon, prayed for the sick inmates, and witnessed many prisoners accepting Jesus and sharing testimonies of their healings. We distributed packages containing personal items and shared a meal with some prisoners in their cell.

Saturday, November 29th, we addressed the nationwide conference for all pastors and workers of LFCI led by Bishop Israel Sanoy. Both Adalia and I spoke in the morning and afternoon sessions, witnessing many miraculous healings. The service was so powerful that they struggled to bring it to a close due to the overwhelming presence of the Holy Spirit.

On Sunday, November 30th, we both spoke at the LFCI Calumpt Church, experiencing another profound move of God with many healings and individuals being overcome by the spirit. On December 1st, we celebrated Bishop Israel Sanoy's 40th Ministry Anniversary, followed by teaching at the pastors' convention of LFCI on December 2nd.

That evening, we enjoyed a victory dinner at a Korean restaurant before flying back to Seattle, returning home on December 3, 2025.

posts.title: The 9th World Holy Spirit Ministries International Conference - Korea
posts.excerpt: On the 29th of September 2025, seven members of my esteemed WMI team embarked on a flight from Sea Tac, WA., to Incheon, South Korea, arriving at precisely 4:30 pm on the…
posts.bodyHtml:
On the 29th of September 2025, seven members of my esteemed WMI team embarked on a flight from Sea Tac, WA., to Incheon, South Korea, arriving at precisely 4:30 pm on the following day. I selected five of my dedicated staff to join me as speakers at The 9th World Holy Spirit Ministry International Conference in Buchun City, South Korea. The conference spanned from October 1st to the 3rd, featuring approximately 50 international speakers and worship singers who flew into minister. The majority of speakers conducted breakout sessions, while a select few addressed the General Session.

Upon our arrival, once all the participants had gathered, we boarded a team bus that transported us to a restaurant for dinner, before finally checking into our hotel around 11pm. We commenced our days by leaving the hotel promptly at 8 am on Wednesday mornings for breakfast at the church, a routine we followed daily. The conference officially commenced at 9 am each day and continued until approximately 9 to 10 pm every night. Mornings were dedicated to worship and the general session until noon, followed by lunch, and then breakout sessions from 2 to 5 pm, allowing attendees to choose their preferred class. Dinner was served from 5 to 7 pm, and the evening services were filled with worship, singers, dancers, and a keynote speaker. Despite the long days, the experience was immensely gratifying, with a strong focus on the Holy Spirit and an abundance of worship during each service, rejuvenating us with the power of the Holy Spirit.

Saturday, October 4th, was a well-deserved day off, during which we engaged in a tour. On Sunday, October 5th, I delivered a speech at the Gloria Church led by Senior Pastor Young-Kwang Shin, with my WMI team, the Hawaii team, and my wife participating. Later that evening, we flew back to Seattle, while the Hawaii team returned to Honolulu. All the other speakers and singers departed from Korea on Saturday evening, as attested by the Korean Church below. I urge you to read this testimony and extend your support as | journey across nations to forewarn, prepare, and safeguard Christ's bride.

To the Korean Church: I bring you greetings from Drs. Jonathan and Adalia Hansen. The need for the believer to be filled and led daily by the Holy Spirit is greater now than ever before. I warned prophetically at the beginning of 2025 that this year is going to be a very prophetic dangerous year where the believer needs to be very sensitive and flexible to the leading of the Holy Spirit. I started traveling each month to different locations. On January 14, 2025 we were at Mar-a-Lago, Florida with the Jerusalem Prayer Breakfast (JPB) to pray for President Donald Trump. One week later on January 21, 2025 we attended the 119th US Congress for the Israel Allies Foundation as l am a member of the Knesset Christian Allies Caucus (KCAC). In Washington D.C., | visited with various political leaders from the Senate and House of Representatives of America as well as with leaders from around the world.

In February and March we were in Kenya, East Africa, and in April in Norway. In May in Africa again. In June, we were on our way to Israel to attend the KCAC when Israel bombed Iran's Nuclear Sites and Israeli Air Space and their airport was shut down and our airplane from New York to Tel Aviv was cancelled.

Other nations we visited in 2025 were Liberia, Malawi, Columbia, Israel, the Philippines and here in South Korea. In each nation I addressed the need for a National Repentance and warned about the tyranny that is sweeping the nations, taking away the freedoms of individuals. I warned that their plan is to destroy the Old Order and bring us all into the New World Order (NWO).

The only power that can stop the evil plans in each nation is the baptism of the Holy Spirit as Jesus commanded his disciples in Acts 2: 1-4 to make disciples in every nation through His power!

I have clearly warned if the church doesn't arise and do more than pray, the church will lose its freedom. We were commanded by the Lord when He ascended to make disciples of every nation. This Holy Spirit Conference is critical.

Blessings, Rev. Dr. Jonathan Hansen
Founder & President of World Ministries International & Eagles Saving Nations
B.A. Liberal Arts, B.A.Th., M. Th., M. Div., D. Min., D. Th., and Honorary D. Div.

posts.excerpt: On Friday, October 17, 2025, I had the honor of speaking at the Global International 2025 Congress of Apostolic Leaders held in Baltimore, Maryland. On Saturday, October 18th, we…
posts.bodyHtml:
On Friday, October 17, 2025, I had the honor of speaking at the Global International 2025 Congress of Apostolic Leaders held in Baltimore, Maryland. 

On Saturday, October 18th, we departed from Baltimore and traveled through several connecting flights; Baltimore to Detroit, then to Seattle, and onward to JFK International Airport in New York, before finally boarding our flight to Tel Aviv, Israel. Due to delays in New York, we experienced an extended layover of approximately 15½ hours before departure.

We arrived at Ben Gurion Airport on Monday, October 20th, around 4:00 p.m., and after three full days of travel, we reached our destination exhausted but thankful. That evening, we checked into the New Imperial Hotel in Old Jerusalem at approximately 7:00 p.m.

This trip to Israel was of great significance. We met daily with various leaders, beginning Tuesday, October 21st, at the Knesset Christian Allies Caucus in the Israeli Parliament, where we participated in discussions addressing global peace initiatives and President Trump’s twenty-point peace plan.

On Wednesday, October 22nd, we had a profound encounter in Old Jerusalem, praying with a Muslim gentleman before visiting and praying at the Wailing Wall (Western Wall). Later that evening, we met with former MK Rabbi Yehuda Glick and his wife, Hadas Dissen Glick, who lead the Amitsim Ministry for widows and orphans.

My wife, Dr. Adalia Hansen, who directs the WMI Dorcas Fund for Widows and Orphans, was deeply moved by their work and expressed her joy in seeing their shared mission to support vulnerable women and children. The WMI Dorcas Fund is now partnering with Amitsim to strengthen and expand these life-changing efforts.

On Thursday, October 23rd, we met with former Israeli Ambassador to Kenya, Michael Lotem, engaging in meaningful dialogue about strengthening faith-based partnerships and regional understanding.

Friday, October 24th, was spent at the Dead Sea, where we filmed television segments for our upcoming ministry broadcast. It was also a joyful moment for our family as our son had the memorable experience of riding a camel near Jericho.

On Saturday morning, October 25th, we visited Golgotha and the Garden Tomb, reflecting deeply on the power of the resurrection. In the afternoon, we traveled to Bethlehem to visit and pray with another Muslim family at the site traditionally recognized as the birthplace of Jesus.

Throughout our stay, we recorded daily television programs on location, capturing the spirit of the Holy Land and the significance of unity among believers. Dr. Adalia Hansen also conducted an insightful interview with former MK Rabbi Yehuda Glick, discussing interfaith collaboration and shared humanitarian efforts. 

On Sunday, October 26th, we departed from Tel Aviv to JFK International Airport, enduring a 13-hour layover before continuing our journey home on Monday morning, October 27th, for Seattle, Washington.

It was indeed a long and tiring journey, but we count it all joy to make the sacrifice in service to our Messiah.

posts.bodyHtml:
There is a prophecy in the Bible that Germany will instigate another World War. We have heard reports that by 2029 Germany plans to nearly triple their defense budget and I believe the Bible reveals that Germany will suddenly start a World War.

Revelation 17 RSV

The Great Whore and the Beast

1 Then one of the seven angels who had the seven bowls came and said to me, “Come, I will show you the judgment of the great harlot who is seated upon many waters, 2 with whom the kings of the earth have committed fornication, and with the wine of whose fornication the dwellers on earth have become drunk.” 3 And he carried me away in the Spirit into a wilderness, and I saw a woman sitting on a scarlet beast which was full of blasphemous names, and it had seven heads and ten horns. 4 The woman was arrayed in purple and scarlet, and bedecked with gold and jewels and pearls, holding in her hand a golden cup full of abominations and the impurities of her fornication; 5 and on her forehead was written a name of mystery: “Babylon the great, mother of harlots and of earth’s abominations.” 6 And I saw the woman, drunk with the blood of the saints and the blood of the martyrs of Jesus.

When I saw her I marveled greatly. 7 But the angel said to me, “Why marvel? I will tell you the mystery of the woman, and of the beast with seven heads and ten horns that carries her. 8 The beast that you saw was, and is not, and is to ascend from the bottomless pit and go to perdition; and the dwellers on earth whose names have not been written in the book of life from the foundation of the world, will marvel to behold the beast, because it was and is not and is to come. 9 This calls for a mind with wisdom: the seven heads are seven mountains on which the woman is seated; 10 they are also seven kings, five of whom have fallen, one is, the other has not yet come, and when he comes he must remain only a little while. 11 As for the beast that was and is not, it is an eighth but it belongs to the seven, and it goes to perdition. 12 And the ten horns that you saw are ten kings who have not yet received royal power, but they are to receive authority as kings for one hour, together with the beast. 13 These are of one mind and give over their power and authority to the beast; 14 they will make war on the Lamb, and the Lamb will conquer them, for he is Lord of lords and King of kings, and those with him are called and chosen and faithful.”

15 And he said to me, “The waters that you saw, where the harlot is seated, are peoples and multitudes and nations and tongues. 16 And the ten horns that you saw, they and the beast will hate the harlot; they will make her desolate and naked, and devour her flesh and burn her up with fire, 17 for God has put it into their hearts to carry out his purpose by being of one mind and giving over their royal power to the beast, until the words of God shall be fulfilled. 18 And the woman that you saw is the great city which has dominion over the kings of the earth.”

NOTE: Revelation 17 is talking about the rise of a military alliance of 10 kings leading 10 nations or groups of nations in Europe. Biblical Assyria is today’s Germany and this alliance will be dominated by Germany. Germany has already started World War 1 and 2 and they will start another major World War.

Isaiah 10 warns us that God will use the modern Assyrians, which is Germany, soon and  Germany will start another war to punish the descendants of Biblical Israel which is Israel, The United States and Britain.

Isaiah 10:5-7 RSV

5 Ah, Assyria, the rod of my anger, the staff of my fury! 6 Against a godless nation I send him, and against the people of my wrath I command him, to take spoil and seize plunder, and to tread them down like the mire of the streets. 7 But he does not so intend, and his mind does not so think; but it is in his mind to destroy, and to cut off nations not a few;

NOTE:  If you understand The Science of Judgment, God is going to use Germany to destroy many nations. It will be a German led European Union supported by the Vatican. Germany has the third largest economy and German leaders are determined to transform their industrial power for military purposes.

“In August 1944 toward the end of WWII, representatives of massive German companies like Krupp, Messerschmidt, Volkswagenwerk and Rheinmetall met with senior Nazis  at the so-called Red House Meeting. A U.S. intelligence document declassified in 1996, says these business leaders were told they must prepare to finance the Nazi Party, which was about to be forced to go underground. They instructed those industrialists to place existing financial reserves in foreign countries at the disposal of the party so that a strong German empire can be created after the defeat.

This is what these leaders were saying after millions of people had been killed and as German cities lay in ashes!  They were ready to build up that beastly military juggernaut again!

In 1944, they were already planning for the next round. They went underground and began to build another empire to start another war!

Germany’s status as the world’s largest creditor nation shows that this plan was carried out. Today, the sons and grandsons of those industrialists are rising up out of the underground. Everybody can see them. And they are about to start WW III! 

Watch Germany!  You need to realize what is about to happen. They are talking peace but they are about to start a war like this world has never seen!  Many biblical prophecies tell you this.” The Philadelphia Trumpet, September 2025, page 6.

Please read Revelation 18. This refers to modern Europe as Babylon.

Jeremiah 1:13-15 RSV

13 The word of the Lord came to me a second time, saying, “What do you see?” And I said, “I see a boiling pot, facing away from the north.” 14 Then the Lord said to me, “Out of the north evil shall break forth upon all the inhabitants of the land. 15 For lo, I am calling all the tribes of the kingdoms of the north, says the Lord; and they shall come and every one shall set his throne at the entrance of the gates of Jerusalem, against all its walls round about, and against all the cities of Judah.

NOTE:  Could this boiling pot be describing the condition of Germany boiling over to terrible destruction. 

Daniel 8:23 RSV

23 And at the latter end of their rule, when the transgressors have reached their full measure, a king of bold countenance/king of fierce countenance, one who understands riddles, shall arise.

NOTE:  Remember the ancient Antiochus; a prophetic forerunner did great damage but he was not the one to fulfill the prophecy in these end times. Germany is greater in power than any other European country including possibly Russia.

Daniel 12:4, 9 RSV

4 But you, Daniel, shut up the words, and seal the book, until the time of the end. Many shall run to and fro, and knowledge shall increase.”

9 He said, “Go your way, Daniel, for the words are shut up and sealed until the time of the end.

NOTE:  Again, Germany is greater in power than any other European country including possibly Russia. Prophecies reveal this future type of Antiochus is going to be controlled by the devil himself.

Daniel 8:24 RSV

24 His power shall be great, and he shall cause fearful destruction, and shall succeed in what he does, and destroy mighty men and the people of the saints.

NOTE:  He will be controlled and empowered by Satan the devil who is deceiving the entire world.

2 Corinthians 4:4 RSV

4 In their case the god of this world has blinded the minds of the unbelievers, to keep them from seeing the light of the gospel of the glory of Christ, who is the likeness of God.

NOTE:  Satan is the god of this world deceiving people into attacking Christians etc. Read Revelation 12:9 below.

Revelation 12:9 RSV

9 And the great dragon was thrown down, that ancient serpent, who is called the Devil and Satan, the deceiver of the whole world—he was thrown down to the earth, and his angels were thrown down with him.

Daniel 8:24-25 RSV

24 His power shall be great, and he shall cause fearful destruction, and shall succeed in what he does, and destroy mighty men and the people of the saints. 25 By his cunning he shall make deceit prosper under his hand, and in his own mind he shall magnify himself. Without warning he shall destroy many; and he shall even rise up against the Prince of princes; but, by no human hand, he shall be broken.

NOTE:  Christ himself will come and destroy this seventh and last resurrection of the Holy Roman Empire.

CONCLUSION:  As I mentioned in my last article, 1/3 of the Bible is prophecy and 90% of that prophecy is for today, yet 95% of the church reject prophecy. God calls those who refuse to teach His prophecies His enemies. These biblical prophecies are God’s warnings for the protection of His bride so they are not deceived or taken unaware. If you attend a church that refuses to teach from the prophecies in the Bible, then leave that church because God is against your pastor who is failing to sound the alarm to His bride to help them face the future in these end times.  Remember, I do need your support to continue to sound the alarm to the nations. We're calling for National Repentance in America and every nation. Join Eagles Saving Nations at worldministries.org to help us get into the stadiums in the nations for Repentance. Also, order my books, ‘The Science of Judgment’ and ‘The Church Has Divorced Itself from its Roots’. They are available via worldministries.org or Amazon. May God richly bless you.

posts.title: Prophecy-Ukraine & Russia-America & Nuclear War
posts.excerpt: Do you realize that one third of the Bible is prophecy and ninety percent of that prophecy is for today ? Yet we find that ninety-five percent of Christians reject prophecy. God…
posts.bodyHtml:
Do you realize that one third of the Bible is prophecy and ninety percent of that prophecy is for today? Yet we find that ninety-five percent of Christians reject prophecy. God calls these Christians His enemies because they reject His warnings.

Matthew 24:4-22 NKJV

4And Jesus answered and said to them: “Take heed that no one deceives you. 5For many will come in My name, saying, ‘I am the Christ,’ and will deceive many."

NOTE: Jesus is warning about people (Pastors) using His name but not preaching His message correctly. In vs 6, Christ goes on to warn them of “wars and rumors of wars”.

 6And you will hear of wars and rumors of wars. See that you are not troubled; for all these things must come to pass, but the end is not yet. 7For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. And there will be famines, pestilences, and earthquakes in various places. 8All these are the beginning of sorrows.

NOTE: Jesus warns of nations rising against other nations; famines, pestilences and earthquakes. But He tells us not to worry for this has to happen before the Lord returns.

9“Then they will deliver you up to tribulation and kill you, and you will be hated by all nations for My name’s sake. 10And then many will be offended, will betray one another, and will hate one another. 11Then many false prophets will rise up and deceive many. 12And because lawlessness will abound, the love of many will grow cold. 13But he who endures to the end shall be saved. 14And this gospel of the kingdom will be preached in all the world as a witness to all the nations, and then the end will come.

NOTE: Verse 11 states that many false prophets speaking words of deception against the warning/prophecies of Jesus Christ will say "It is not that bad, don’t worry, peace is coming." In the Old Testament the true prophets came with a warning and the false prophets nullified God's warning saying to the king, "no, there will be peace. Don’t listen to this prophet of doom for he always brings bad news."

15“Therefore when you see the ‘abomination of desolation,’ spoken of by Daniel the prophet, standing in the holy place” (whoever reads, let him understand), 16“then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains. 17Let him who is on the housetop not go down to take anything out of his house. 18And let him who is in the field not go back to get his clothes. 19But woe to those who are pregnant and to those who are nursing babies in those days! 20And pray that your flight may not be in winter or on the Sabbath. 21For then there will be great tribulation, such as has not been since the beginning of the world until this time, no, nor ever shall be. 22And unless those days were shortened, no flesh would be saved; but for the elect’s sake those days will be shortened.

NOTE: There are clear warnings here by Christ Himself, but if you are one of the ninety-five percent today who rejects prophecies, you will become a victim, because you are rejecting the warnings of God, and now God Himself calls you His enemy.

Micah was an Old Testament Prophet whose prophecies were for today.

Micah 2:4

4In that day one shall take up a proverb against you, and lament with a bitter lamentation, saying: ‘We are utterly destroyed! He has changed the heritage of my people; How He has removed it from me! To a turncoat He has divided our fields.’ ”

NOTE: When you read “in that day” it is referring to this end time.

Woe to Evildoers - Micah 2:1-8

1Woe to those who devise iniquity, and work out evil on their beds! At morning light they practice it, Because it is in the power of their hand. 2They covet fields and take them by violence, Also houses, and seize them. So they oppress a man and his house, A man and his inheritance.

3Therefore thus says the Lord:

“Behold, against this family I am devising disaster, from which you cannot remove your necks; Nor shall you walk haughtily, For this is an evil time. 4In that day one shall take up a proverb against you, and lament with a bitter lamentation, saying: ‘We are utterly destroyed! He has changed the heritage of my people; How He has removed it from me! To a turncoat He has divided our fields.’ ”

5Therefore you will have no one to determine boundaries by lot in the assembly of the Lord.

Lying Prophets

6“Do not prattle,” you say to those who prophesy. So they shall not prophesy to you; They shall not return insult for insult. 7You who are named the house of Jacob: “Is the Spirit of the Lord restricted? Are these His doings? Do not My words do good to him who walks uprightly?

8“Lately My people have risen up as an enemy—You pull off the robe with the garment from those who trust you, as they pass by, like men returned from war.

NOTE: God is telling/warning them that because they rejected the warnings/prophecies from God, they are now His enemy. What a serious indictment. The robe/garment refers to our spiritual lives; God's people are to be clothed in fine linen, the righteousness of the saints.

Revelation 19:8

8 And to her it was granted to be arrayed in fine linen, clean and bright, for the fine linen is the righteous acts of the saints.

Micah 3:1-6

Wicked Rulers and Prophets

1And I said: Hear, you heads of Jacob and rulers of the house of Israel! Is it not for you to know justice?—2You who hate the good and love the evil, who tear the skin from off my people, and their flesh from off their bones; 3Who eat the flesh of my people, and flay their skin from off them, and break their bones in pieces, and chop them up like meat in a kettle, like flesh in a caldron.

4Then they will cry to the Lord, but He will not answer them; He will hide His face from them at that time, because they have made their deeds evil.

5Thus says the Lord concerning the prophets who lead My people astray, who cry “Peace” when they have something to eat, but declare war against him who puts nothing into their mouths.

6Therefore it shall be night to you, without vision, and darkness to you, without divination. The sun shall go down upon the prophets, and the day shall be black over them;

NOTE: The Bible actually warns about two billion people dying in the book of Revelation. Russian President Putin is determined to restore Ukraine back to Russia as Ukraine was the breadbasket of the old Soviet Empire. Russia and North Korea along with China are making threats of attacking Israel and The United States of America with nuclear weapons.

Isaiah 59:8

8 The way of peace they know not, and there is no justice in their paths; they have made their roads crooked, no one who goes in them knows peace.

Romans 3:17

17and the way of peace they do not know.”

CONCLUSION: The Bible is clear that the prophecies in the scriptures are God’s warning signs. They are God's messages to His bride so they can prepare and not be taken by surprise when trouble is approaching. Moses gave a warning from God to Pharaoh, but he would not listen and Pharaoh became an enemy of God, falling victim to the plagues. One third of the Bible is prophecy and ninety percent of prophecy is for today, yet ninety-five percent of the church rejects God’s voice of warning. Consequently, God calls these people, especially the pastors, who fail to teach on the prophecies, His enemies.

Don’t be a victim. Since 2020, God gave me twenty-five dreams of Civil Unrest, Civil War and an Invasion. If your church doesn’t believe in the baptism of the Holy Spirit; if they don’t believe that prophecy is for today; if they don’t believe in sin, but instead support abortion and homosexuality, then leave that apostate church because judgment is coming and they will be a victim.

Visit my website at worldministries.org and join Eagles Saving Nations, focused on National Repentance in every nation. Also order my books, The Science of Judgment and The Church Has Divorced itself from its Roots, via my website or Amazon. Please support us financially so we can continue to sound the alarm, warning the nations of judgment and how to escape it.

Jonathan Hansen

posts.title: Kenya & Malawi September 4-18, 2025
posts.excerpt: On September 4 th , 2025 we flew from SeaTac International Airport to France and then to Nairobi, Kenya, arriving Sept 5 th . We were met at the airport by one of my WMI staff…
posts.bodyHtml:
On September 4th, 2025 we flew from SeaTac International Airport to France and then to Nairobi, Kenya, arriving Sept 5th. We were met at the airport by one of my WMI staff Paul, as well as Apostle Joe Mwaniki. We were driven to our lodging residence where Arch Bishop Harrison Nganga and his wife met us. We enjoyed some fellowship and prayed together for the salvation of Kenya.

On Sept 6th, my wife, son and I visited with Bishop Geoffrey and Elizabeth Njuguna at their house before we met for dinner with the former Vice President, Stephen Kilonzo Musyoka at his home. In all of my meetings, I discussed the things pertaining to the Kingdom of God and our responsibilities to heal, protect and save a nation.

On Sunday, Sept 7th I spoke at Bishop Thomas Muthee’s, Word of Faith Church with my wife, Dr. Adalia, ministering to many people at the altar.

On Monday Sept 8th, we were driven to Jomo Kenyatta Int’l. airport by Dr. Mike Hyodo, my WMI staff representative in Kenya, where my family and I flew to Malawi, by invitation, to be with the President, Lazarus Chakwera.

Upon arrival in Malawi, we were met on the tarmac, put into a black vehicle, and driven to the airport lounge where our luggage and passports were brought to us. We never saw the inside of the airport terminal but were driven straight to the President’s house and then taken to our lodging.

While in Malawi, Sept 8-15, I had a chauffeur, security agent and vehicle which accompanied us everywhere. We spoke to Apostolic Leaders as well as a church. We spent time with the President. Please look at the close of this article to see what the Lord said, through me, to the President.

Sept 15-17, we were back in Nairobi, Kenya where I met with Bishop Geoffrey Njuguna, discussing the situation in Kenya and what the church must do to save the nation. My wife and I also prayed for a young lady and her mother. We also prayed for Bishop Michael Wafula who had suffered a serious health issue. God was healing him. We also caught up with Mike and Cheryl Freese; missionaries to Kenya and flew from Kenya to Amsterdam together.
